creator: dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
text:
Hallo Hirohisa Yamaguchi,

unter dem Betreff 'Re: ports/121529: portupgrade to mail/dkim-milter 2.5.0 failed' geschrieben:

> I'm wondering how can I solve this...

Would a new Option like:

WITHOUT_MILTER_CFLAGS=yes

Before including bsd.milter.mk help?

I would add such an option in bsd.milter.mk.

kind regards Dirk

- Dirk Meyer, Im Grund 4, 34317 Habichtswald, Germany
- [dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org],[dirk.meyer@guug.de],[dinoex@FreeBSD.org]
http://people.freebsd.org/~dinoex/errorlogs/
